description: TrueLayer provides open banking infrastructure for payments, payouts, recurring payments, account data access, and related verification flows. Its products let businesses connect to bank providers and move or retrieve financial data through a unified platform.
summary: TrueLayer exposes documented HTTP APIs for payments, data, mandates, payouts, merchant accounts, verification/signup-related features, plus an experimental MCP server package for AI assistants; both rely on developer-issued TrueLayer app credentials, and some payment operations also require request-signing keys.
